falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 10% resistance level established during the bottom_2024_aug pattern
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key level would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the unknown verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would confirm extreme market overbought conditions, refuting the current 'HOLD' and suggesting a potential reversal rather than continuation of the prior pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 150% above the 14-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would indicate a confirmed market move (either bullish or bearish), invalidating the 'HOLD' by proving a clear trend is emerging.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
